description: ElevenLabs Conversational AI API validation constraints and best practices

conversation_config.description: Full conversation_config object required for PATCH /v1/convai/agents/{agent_id}

mutually_exclusive_fields.description: Cannot provide both tools array and tool_ids array in agent.prompt
mutually_exclusive_fields.rule: Use EITHER tools (full definition) OR tool_ids (reference) - never both

tool_schema_property_constraints.description: Each property in api_schema.request_body_schema.properties can only have ONE of these fields set
tool_schema_property_constraints.rule: Set ONLY description for enriched tool fields - remove all other metadata fields
tool_schema_property_constraints.violation_error: value_error: Can only set one of: description, dynamic_variable, is_system_provided, or constant_value

field_description_format.example: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (+1XXXXXXXXXX for US/Canada). MUST validate: starts with +, 10-15 digits, no spaces/dashes. ALWAYS check {{system__caller_id}} before asking user.

enum_guidance.description: List allowed values in description text, not enum field
enum_guidance.example: Business industry for lead qualification. Values: hvac, plumbing, property_management, legal, veterinary, automotive, construction, retail, healthcare, other. Default 'other'.

optional_fields.description: Mark optional fields with impact statement
optional_fields.example: Company/business name for lead enrichment. Optional but HIGHLY RECOMMENDED (improves lead quality 40%). Max 100 chars.

mcp__elevenlabs-mcp__update_agent.error_visibility: Poor - nested JSON errors in detail.message
mcp__elevenlabs-mcp__update_agent.recommendation: For complex tool schema updates, use direct HTTPS to api.elevenlabs.io with better error handling

both_tools_and_tool_ids_provided.cause: Provided both agent.prompt.tools array AND agent.prompt.tool_ids array
both_tools_and_tool_ids_provided.fix: Remove agent.prompt.tool_ids field when providing full tools array

property_field_conflict.fix: Keep only type and description fields, remove enum/is_system_provided/dynamic_variable/constant_value
property_field_conflict.prevention: Clean schema properties before update: Object.keys(schema).forEach(key => { delete schema[key].enum; delete schema[key].is_system_provided; delete schema[key].dynamic_variable; delete schema[key].constant_value; })

tool_enrichment_steps: 5. Clean properties: remove enum, is_system_provided, dynamic_variable, constant_value
6. Remove agent.prompt.tool_ids if present (when providing full tools array)
8. Verify with GET to confirm changes applied
